_comment: Terms-preview payload (on_select / on_init) — entitlement not yet issued. Identity fields (entitlementId, issuerId, holderId) are absent because the entitlement does not exist until on_confirm. Only capacity, validity, and scope terms are communicated at this stage.

beckn:contractAttributes.refundRules: Unused capacity refundable at 80% of face value within 30 days of expiry
beckn:contractAttributes.forfeitureRules: Capacity not redeemed by validUntil date is forfeited with no refund
